description_long: This is a thick, rectangular book with a slightly curved spine and visible wear along the edges, suggesting frequent handling. The front cover features a sepia-toned historical photograph of several people, with one central figure standing out, and a gold circular badge indicating a special edition. The back cover is mostly dark with a block of white text and a QR code near the bottom, as well as a barcode and publisher information. The spine is narrow, with the title and a portion of the cover image wrapping around, and the top and bottom edges of the book show the texture of stacked white pages. The book's surface appears to be matte with a slight sheen, and the corners are slightly rounded. The overall color palette is dominated by dark blue, gold, and white tones.
description: A thick, dark-colored book with a sepia-toned historical photograph on the front and visible text on the back, featuring a gold badge and a slightly curved spine.
description_view_0: The back cover is visible, showing a block of white text, a QR code, and a barcode on a dark background.
description_view_1: The spine is visible, showing the title text vertically and a portion of the cover image wrapping around.
description_view_2: The front cover is visible, featuring a sepia-toned historical photograph, a gold badge, and prominent title text.
description_view_3: The opposite edge of the spine is visible, mostly showing the white pages and a small part of the cover.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover displays a sepia-toned historical photograph featuring a group of people, with one central figure in formal attire standing out among others. The image has a documentary style, evoking a sense of historical significance and solemnity. There is also a gold circular badge on the lower left.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark blue with the title text running vertically in white, accompanied by a partial wraparound of the front cover image. The design is simple and matches the front cover's color scheme.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, circular gold badge is visible on the lower right of the front cover, likely representing the publisher's logo, but no distinct publisher logo is clearly identifiable.
